title: prestonia folsomii
intro: Prestonia folsomii, also known as Folsom's Prestonia, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Prestonia folsomii has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, treat hypertension, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Prestonia folsomii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as a natural sedative. Herbal preparations of Prestonia folsomii typically involve drying and processing the plant's leaves or roots, which can then be used to make teas, tinctures, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
